title: Add 14 Socket.IO event tests — full relay coverage
reasoning: Added socket.io-client as dev dep and wrote 14 tests covering all Socket.IO event paths: extension connect/disconnect lifecycle, client extension_status query, skill_run routing (no ext / with ext), chain_result resolution, chain_error rejection, chain_error with partial result, inject_chat forwarding via HTTP and socket, notify event, get_status for unknown commands, inject_ack success/error/missing-tabId. Every relay code path now has test coverage.
